gt_sql: SELECT T2.gender FROM district AS T1 INNER JOIN client AS T2 ON T1.district_id = T2.district_id ORDER BY T1.A11 DESC, T2.birth_date ASC LIMIT 1
pred_sql:
SELECT c.gender
FROM client c
JOIN disp d ON c.client_id = d.client_id
JOIN account a ON d.account_id = a.account_id
JOIN district dist ON a.district_id = dist.district_id
WHERE dist.A11 = (SELECT MAX(CAST(A11 AS INTEGER)) FROM district)
ORDER BY c.birth_date ASC
LIMIT 1;
question: What is the gender of the oldest client who opened his/her account in the highest average salary branch?
